## Why It Works

This content worked for a few reasons: it provides a clear, step-by-step guide; it shows people that anyone can start a meaningful project or business; and when focused on solving the audience's challenges, it promotes engagement and an opportunity for people to add their own bullets.

## Template

· Identify a [Skill or Interest]
· Dedicate [Time Period] to improve it
· Document and share your journey [Online/Through a Medium]
· Engage with [Number] of individuals interested in [Related Topic]
· Discover their key challenges in [Topic/Area]
· Develop a solution or offer tailored to these challenges
Doing this can lead to a meaningful [Project, Side Hustle, or Business] in almost any field.

## Example

· Identify a productivity method
· Dedicate six months to mastering it
· Document and share your journey on a blog
· Engage with 100 individuals interested in personal efficiency
· Discover their key challenges in managing time
· Develop a workshop or coaching service tailored to these time management challenges
Doing this can lead to a meaningful side hustle or business in productivity coaching.
